weapon_prompt.title: WHAT DID YOU BRING?
weapon_prompt.subtitle: You can pick from the suggestions or write your own.

options.label: SWORD
options.fail_line: The blade shatters on a coffee table on your way in. Try again.

options.label: BOOK
options.fail_line: You can barely lift it. The corners hurt your fingers more than they hurt anyone else. Try again.

options.label: COFFEE MUG
options.fail_line: Hot. It is so hot. You're the one taking damage. Try again.

door_floor_1.title: THE DOOR.
door_floor_1.subtitle: The Tenant is on the other side. They sound annoyed.

options.label: KICK DOWN
options.fail_line: The door opens outward. You bounce. Embarrassing.

options.label: KNOCK POLITELY
options.fail_line: From inside: "Go away. I'm watching my show."

options.label: FOOL!
options.fail_line: Nothing happens. You said it out loud. Why did you say it out loud.

options.label: OPEN IT
options.fail_line: Just leftovers. Some of them blink.

options.label: KICK IT
options.fail_line: Your toe regrets this. The fridge does not.
